import { CoinGeckoExchanges } from '/snippets/components/integrations/coingecko.jsx'

<Note>
  Livepeer does not recommend any specific exchange. This is provided as a
  convenient reference only.
</Note>

## 支持 Arbitrum 的交易所 One

此列表（限前 100 个结果）是动态从[CoinGecko](https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/arbitrum) 获取的，使用他们的[API](https://www.coingecko.com/en/api/documentation) 并显示为可排序的表格，默认按 CoinGecko 提供的顺序排列（通常按交易量/流动性排序）。

<CoinGeckoExchanges coinId="arbitrum" />
